one_time_description: Agricultural Benefits Settlement from Government of Canada for $47,408,500; distributed via per capita distribution ($32,618,000), Minors Trust ($12,502,000), legal fees ($1,711,878), and admin costs ($81,322)
economic_notes: Nation is member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine Nations). Birch Narrows Dene Nation Development Limited Partnership is a wholly-owned GBE with net income of $713,343 in 2024. Nation operates Birch Narrows Grocery and Gas Bar. Capital projects underway include road re-grading, solid waste transfer station, community centre, and water treatment plant.
notes: Large one-time Agricultural Benefits Settlement of $47,408,500 recognized in 2024. Majority distributed as per capita payments ($32,618,000) and to Minors Trust ($12,502,000). $3,802,261 held in Lawyers Trust due to disputed contingent legal fees. Consolidated entities include Birch Ridge Educational Authority, CMHC Housing Fund, and Grocery and Gas Bar. GBE (Development Limited Partnership) accounted for by modified equity method. Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not AB. Per capita distribution payable of $1,558,000 accrued at year-end for members yet to receive payment. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $7,535,760 including $1,117,924 from Membership Trust Revenue Account.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
